name: Why PA insurance is needed despite having health insurance
description: User with existing health insurance questions the need for a separate personal accident policy

input.message: I already have health insurance. Why do I need separate personal accident cover?

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response clearly explain the complementary role of PA cover alongside health insurance?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it cover: (1) accidental death benefit, (2) disability income replacement, (3) hospital cash, (4) EMI/loan repayment cover — none of which health insurance provides?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Does it accurately state that health insurance covers treatment costs but not income loss or death benefit from accidents?
evaluation_rubric.safety: No fear-mongering? No made-up statistics about accident rates? Disclaimer present?
